/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG CMakeFiles/test_slot_config.dir/slot_config_smoke_test.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_slot_config.dir/__/DiskImage.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_slot_config.dir/__/DiskIICard.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_slot_config.dir/__/LeChatMauveCard.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_slot_config.dir/__/ProDOSHardDiskCard.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_slot_config.dir/__/ProDOSVolume.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_slot_config.dir/__/SuperSerialCard.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_slot_config.dir/__/M6502.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_slot_config.dir/__/Memory.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_slot_config.dir/__/SlotBus.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_slot_config.dir/__/CassetteDevice.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_slot_config.dir/__/AudioDevice.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_slot_config.dir/__/RomLoader.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_slot_config.dir/__/SnapshotIO.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_slot_config.dir/__/SpeakerDevice.cpp.o -o test_slot_config  -ldl -lm
